about_desc: I am a motivated {{age}}-year-old information and communication technology engineer with a particular passion for software development. I am analytical and solution-oriented by nature, applying first principles thinking to identify root causes of problems and discover effective solutions. In my free time, I enjoy programming, playing video games, and cycling.
experience_0_overview: Information and Communication Technology (ICT), or simply information technology, encompasses the processing, storage, and retrieval of information using computers and digital communication. It integrates innovative technologies and solutions that enable efficient data utilization and communication.
experience_1_overview: The matriculation examination included advanced mathematics and English, as well as a short native language and Swedish.
experience_3_overview: An intensive Further Educated with Companies (F.E.C.) program by Saranen Consulting combining classroom training with hands-on work at a partner company. The curriculum covers DevOps culture and practices, continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipelines, automated testing, public cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), containerization with Docker and Kubernetes, Infrastructure as Code, observability and monitoring, and the modern toolchain that powers reliable software delivery in production.
